# Preface {.unnumbered}

This is an attempt to reproduce the code from *Virus Dynamics: Mathematical Principles of Immunology and Virology* by Nowak and May [@nowak2000].

No guarantees that anything in this is correct; it is just an attempt to reproduce what is in the book.

This book is written in Quarto markdown (`.qmd`) and rendered using the phenomenal Quarto engine.

To learn more about Quarto books visit <https://quarto.org/docs/books>.
